name: player_successful_passing_play_percentage_from_plays range year_offset pools numerator/denominator
description: Successful passing play % is a percentage: a range year_offset must pool SUM(successful plays)/SUM(pass plays) across the window and scale by 100, not SUM the per-season percentages. Converted from a raw with_select_string column (which summed per-year percentages) to has_numerator_denominator + is_percentage.
expected_query: with "t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f" as materialized (select COALESCE(psr_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN successful_play = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successful_passing_play_pct_from_plays_numerator, SUM(CASE WHEN psr_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successful_passing_play_pct_from_plays_denominator from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025) group by COALESCE(psr_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f.successful_passing_play_pct_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f.successful_passing_play_pct_from_plays_denominator), 0), 2) FROM t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f WHERE t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f.pid = player.pid) AS "successful_passing_play_pct_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
